mapper.select: SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, name, path, component, icon, perm, type, sort_no AS sortNo, visible FROM sys_menu ORDER BY sort_no, id

SELECT DISTINCT m.id, m.parent_id AS parentId, m.name, m.path, m.component, m.icon, m.perm, m.type, m.sort_no AS sortNo, m.visible FROM sys_menu m JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.visible = 1 AND m.type IN (1,2) ORDER BY m.sort_no, m.id
SELECT id, parent_id AS parentId, name, path, component, icon, perm, type, sort_no AS sortNo, visible FROM sys_menu WHERE id = #{id}
